title: Spectator Mod
description: Adds the Spectator from DnD 5e as a summonable and tamable companion to fight the monster hordes!
body:
This Mod adds a custom entity the Spectator from DnD 5e. 

The spectator is summoned through a new craftable item know as the Soulcage created from liquid sorrow and calcified in the strongest substance of the overworld. (ghast tear over one diamond). 

The Spectator is brought to heel by the shattered echos of the lost. (echo shard) 

The spectator will target hostile mobs Excluding the Zombified Piglin. The spectator will target any mob you hit once tamed (So be careful!)

Much like it's 5e counterpart the spectator will inflict debilitating status effects on it's targets including: Withering, Blindness, and Slowness. 

That's Basically it lol!
